title: MysticRift: Music DISCONTINUED
description: Tons of new music disc. non copyright!
body:
![Info.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8bc2c2d03cf9c004a5ab25f82108000006f9079.png)

MysticRift: Music adds 120+ new music to your Minecraft server, You do NOT need a loader for this mod.

![annoucements.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da1e11e8fca6683e5b2edc046482752931f6b030.png)

We have decided to change the update times. Instead of an update every week, we will update every month.

1.20.4 neoforge is live!

1.20.4 is currently in development (Forge)

NB! This music contains NO copy rights and may be used in YouTube vids or live streams.
